---
title: "Figure 2C — correlation corners side by side: MacroIR vs MacroMR"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

<!--
PUBLICATION figure 2, VARIANT C. Two full correlation corners of the four
informative parameters (on, off, unitary_current, Num_ch_mean), side by side:

  LEFT  : MacroIR  -- the self-consistent filter; empirical / Fisher / corrected
                      ellipses coincide in every cell.
  RIGHT : MacroMR  -- the worst classical case; the naive Fisher ellipse (dashed)
                      is visibly tighter than the empirical cloud (solid), i.e.
                      overconfident, while the corrected sandwich (dotted) recovers
                      the empirical spread.

Same anchoring/scaling as figure_2_pub.Rmd (battery covariances at theta_pool,
cov_scale = 1/REP_GROUP). The corner is new (Luciano had none in figure_3_paper);
its empirical-vs-battery scaling follows his per-recording / group_size convention.
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

```{r params}
DATA_DIR  <- "data/433ed13"
REP_NCH      <- 100
REP_NSIM     <- 10000
REP_NOISE    <- "0.1"
REP_GROUP    <- 10
REP_INTERVAL <- 0.1

CORNER_ALGOS <- c("macro_IR", "macro_MR")       # the two corners
ALGO_LAB <- c(macro_NR="NR", macro_NMR="NMR", macro_R="R", macro_MR="MR", macro_IR="IR")

PARAM_IDX <- c(on = 0, off = 1, unitary_current = 2, Num_ch_mean = 5)
PARAM_LAB <- c(on = "log10 k_on", off = "log10 k_off",
               unitary_current = "log10 i_unit", Num_ch_mean = "log10 N_ch")
ORD <- c("on","off","unitary_current","Num_ch_mean")
TRUTH <- c(on = log10(10), off = log10(100),
           unitary_current = log10(1), Num_ch_mean = log10(REP_NCH))

cov_scale <- 1 / REP_GROUP
near_int  <- function(x) abs(x - REP_INTERVAL) < 1e-9
```

```{r read}
read_skip1 <- function(path) read.csv(path, skip = 1, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
base <- file.path(DATA_DIR,
  sprintf("figure_3_nch_%d_nsim_%d_%s_noise_%s", REP_NCH, REP_NSIM, CORNER_ALGOS, REP_NOISE))

cloud   <- map_dfr(paste0(base, "_mle_cloud_runs.csv"), read_skip1)
battery <- map_dfr(paste0(base, "_battery_pool.csv"),   read_skip1) %>%
  mutate(component = str_replace(component_path, "^Probit_statistics_", ""))

pts <- cloud %>%
  filter(component_path == "Model_Parameters_Hat", statistic == "value",
         Num_ch == REP_NCH, group_size == REP_GROUP, near_int(interval_in_tau),
         param_name %in% names(PARAM_IDX)) %>%
  select(algorithm, sample_index, param_name, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = param_name, values_from = value)
```

```{r helpers}
ellipse_path <- function(cx, cy, S, level = 0.95, npoints = 200) {
  if (is.null(S) || any(!is.finite(S))) return(NULL)
  ev <- eigen(S, symmetric = TRUE)
  if (any(ev$values <= 0)) return(NULL)
  r  <- sqrt(qchisq(level, df = 2))
  th <- seq(0, 2 * pi, length.out = npoints)
  Tm <- ev$vectors %*% diag(sqrt(ev$values)) %*% t(ev$vectors)
  P  <- Tm %*% (r * rbind(cos(th), sin(th)))
  data.frame(x = cx + P[1, ], y = cy + P[2, ])
}

battery_cov_pair <- function(comp, algo, pi, pj) {
  df <- battery %>%
    filter(component == comp, statistic == "value", probit == "mean",
           algorithm == algo, Num_ch == REP_NCH, near_int(interval_in_tau),
           param_index %in% c(pi, pj), param_col %in% c(pi, pj)) %>%
    select(param_index, param_col, value)
  m <- matrix(NA_real_, 2, 2); idx <- c(pi, pj)
  for (a in 1:2) for (b in 1:2) {
    v <- df$value[df$param_index == idx[a] & df$param_col == idx[b]]
    if (length(v) == 1 && is.finite(v)) m[a, b] <- v
  }
  m * cov_scale
}

corner_plot <- function(algo, title = NULL) {
  xlev <- ORD[1:3]; ylev <- ORD[2:4]
  prs <- expand.grid(xp = ORD, yp = ORD, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
    filter(match(yp, ORD) > match(xp, ORD))
  cl <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == .env$algo)   # .env: arg wins over any `algo` column
  cloud_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    cl %>% transmute(xp = xp, yp = yp, x = .data[[xp]], y = .data[[yp]])
  }) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
  ell_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xp]], y = .data[[yp]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    if (nrow(c2) < 3) return(NULL)
    ctr <- c(mean(c2$x), mean(c2$y))
    Ss <- list(empirical = cov(cbind(c2$x, c2$y)),
               Fisher    = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp]),
               corrected = battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp]))
    map_dfr(names(Ss), function(nm) {
      e <- ellipse_path(ctr[1], ctr[2], Ss[[nm]]); if (is.null(e)) return(NULL)
      e %>% mutate(xp = xp, yp = yp, source = nm)
    })
  })
  truth_l <- map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k)
    tibble(xp = prs$xp[k], yp = prs$yp[k],
           x = unname(TRUTH[prs$xp[k]]), y = unname(TRUTH[prs$yp[k]])))
  fx <- function(z) factor(z, levels = xlev, labels = PARAM_LAB[xlev])
  fy <- function(z) factor(z, levels = ylev, labels = PARAM_LAB[ylev])
  cloud_l <- mutate(cloud_l, xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp))
  ell_l   <- mutate(ell_l,   xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp),
                    source = factor(source, levels = c("empirical","Fisher","corrected")))
  truth_l <- mutate(truth_l, xp = fx(xp), yp = fy(yp))

  ggplot() +
    geom_point(data = cloud_l, aes(x, y), colour = "grey55", size = .3, alpha = .15) +
    geom_path(data = ell_l, aes(x, y, colour = source, linetype = source), linewidth = .6) +
    geom_point(data = truth_l, aes(x, y), shape = 3, size = 2, stroke = .9, colour = "black") +
    facet_grid(yp ~ xp, scales = "free", drop = FALSE) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c(empirical = "black", Fisher = "#D55E00",
                                   corrected = "#0072B2"), name = NULL) +
    scale_linetype_manual(values = c(empirical = "solid", Fisher = "dashed",
                                     corrected = "dotted"), name = NULL) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = title) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 10) +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom", panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
}
```

```{r plot, fig.width = 17, fig.height = 9}
cIR <- corner_plot("macro_IR", "MacroIR - self-consistent (three ellipses coincide)")
cMR <- corner_plot("macro_MR", "MacroMR - naive Fisher (dashed) overconfident; sandwich (dotted) recovers")

g2C <- (cIR | cMR) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") +
  plot_annotation(
    title = sprintf("Figure 2C  Correlation corners: MacroIR vs MacroMR  (N_ch=%d, noise=%s, Delta/tau=%s, group=%d)",
                    REP_NCH, REP_NOISE, REP_INTERVAL, REP_GROUP),
    subtitle = "Ellipses 95%: empirical / Fisher / corrected.  + = truth.  Lower-triangle corner of (k_on, k_off, i_unit, N_ch).") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")
g2C
ggsave("Figure_2C.pdf", g2C, width = 17, height = 9)
```

```{r diagnostics-table}
# per-pair overconfidence ratio sqrt(det Fisher / det empirical) for both corners
area <- function(S) if (is.null(S) || any(!is.finite(S))) NA else
  { ev <- eigen(S, symmetric = TRUE)$values; if (any(ev <= 0)) NA else sqrt(prod(ev)) }
prs <- expand.grid(xp = ORD, yp = ORD, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  filter(match(yp, ORD) > match(xp, ORD))
map_dfr(CORNER_ALGOS, function(algo) {
  cl <- pts %>% filter(algorithm == algo)
  map_dfr(seq_len(nrow(prs)), function(k) {
    xp <- prs$xp[k]; yp <- prs$yp[k]
    c2 <- cl %>% transmute(x = .data[[xp]], y = .data[[yp]]) %>% filter(is.finite(x), is.finite(y))
    Semp <- if (nrow(c2) > 2) cov(cbind(c2$x, c2$y)) else NULL
    tibble(algorithm = ALGO_LAB[algo], pair = paste(xp, yp, sep = "/"),
           empirical = area(Semp),
           Fisher    = area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Fisher_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp])),
           corrected = area(battery_cov_pair("Likelihood_Distortion_Corrected_Covariance", algo, PARAM_IDX[xp], PARAM_IDX[yp]))) %>%
      mutate(Fisher_over_emp = Fisher / empirical, corrected_over_emp = corrected / empirical)
  })
})
```
